nyra.name: Nyra
nyra.description: Multiple AI squads work in orchestration to capture, qualify, analyze, strategize and close deals — with human intervention only when necessary.
nyra.problem: Sales depend on manual processes, scarce talent and intuition-based decisions. Every lead requires analysis, strategy, personalization and follow-up — tasks that no CRM alone can solve.
nyra.solution: Nyra is not a CRM. It's an artificial sales force composed of specialized squads that autonomously execute the entire sales cycle: capture, qualification, digital maturity analysis, approach strategy definition, tone and channel selection (email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn), pain point understanding, ideal product recommendation and delivery. Humans step in only for strategic decisions and complex closings. Nyra has its own built-in CRM integrated with artificial intelligence, but if a client already uses an external CRM, integration is fast and seamless.
nyra.architecture: AI squad orchestrator → Capture Module → Qualification Module → Maturity Analyzer → Approach Strategist → Tone & Channel Engine → Pain Point Analyzer → Product Recommender → Sales Executor → Delivery. Each squad is an independent microservice with its own language model, knowledge base and performance metrics. Token, data and time economy is the fundamental design principle.
nyra.modules: Capture Squad | Qualification Squad | Digital Maturity Analyst | Approach Strategist | Channel & Tone Engine | Pain Point Analyst | Product Recommender | Sales Executor | Delivery Squad | Central Orchestrator | Built-in CRM with AI
nyra.integrations: WhatsApp Cloud API | Email (SMTP/API) | LinkedIn Automation | External CRM (optional) | ERP | Company Knowledge Base | Conversation Data Lake
nyra.use_cases: Complex B2B sales | Intelligent outbound prospecting | Autonomous inbound service | Account expansion (upsell/cross-sell) | Inactive lead recovery | Technical sales with multiple decision makers
nyra.results: 24/7 artificial sales force | Token and data economy | Every lead treated as unique | Humans only for strategic closing | Scale without adding headcount

inmora.name: InMora
inmora.description: Data and technology to transform real estate management and sales.
inmora.problem: Real estate agencies operate with manual processes, fragmented data and reactive service. Leads get lost, visits go untracked, closing depends on luck.
inmora.solution: InMora centralizes property, lead and contract management with artificial intelligence. Every property is automatically enriched. Every lead gets personalized service at scale.
inmora.features: Property Management | Real Estate CRM | AI Recommendations | Virtual Tour | Digital Contracts | Analytics
inmora.use_cases: Smart property recommendation | Visit automation | Portfolio management | Market analysis
inmora.results: 3x more qualified visits | 50% less closing time | Unified property management

opportunity_engine.name: Opportunity Engine
opportunity_engine.description: Economic intelligence platform based on Brazilian public data.
opportunity_engine.problem: Brazilian public data (IBGE, CAGED, RAIS, CNPJ) is rich but inaccessible. Scattered across incompatible formats, no standardization, no scale.
opportunity_engine.solution: Opportunity Engine ingests, processes and analyzes dozens of public datasets in a unified platform. Structured data lake, DuckDB queries, real-time economic scoring.
opportunity_engine.architecture: Automated ingestion → DuckDB → BigQuery → Feature Store → Scoring Models → API → Dashboard
opportunity_engine.datasets: IBGE | CAGED | RAIS | CNPJ | RFB | SIDRA | IPEA
opportunity_engine.outputs: Economic Scoring | Market Intelligence | Heat Maps | Regional Indicators | Time Series
opportunity_engine.formats: Parquet | Arrow | Delta Lake | OpenAPI | Streaming
opportunity_engine.use_cases: Regional market analysis | Credit scoring | Competitive intelligence | Geographic expansion
opportunity_engine.results: Dozens of unified datasets | Sub-second queries | Ready-to-consume APIs

intelligent_squads.name: Intelligent Squads
intelligent_squads.description: Experts, AI, automation and engineering working in synergy.
intelligent_squads.problem: Companies need high-level technology but lack internal teams. Hiring, training and retaining engineering talent is expensive, slow and risky.
intelligent_squads.solution: Intelligent Squads delivers complete, elastic teams — engineering, data, AI, design, QA — ready to design and execute complex projects.
intelligent_squads.model: Business → Discovery → UX → Software → Data → AI → Cloud → QA → Deploy → Operations
intelligent_squads.specialties: Software Engineering | Artificial Intelligence | Data Engineering | Automation | Cloud | UX/UI | QA | DevOps
intelligent_squads.elasticity: Squads grow, shrink and specialize on demand. An AI squad today, a data squad tomorrow, a full product squad next month. No bureaucracy. No friction.
intelligent_squads.use_cases: Greenfield projects | Product acceleration | AI squads | Data engineering as a service
intelligent_squads.results: On-demand team | Predictable cost | Immediate scalability | Multidisciplinary expertise

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Engineering that transforms businesses through technology.
solutions.ai_desc: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, GenAI, AI Agents and Multi-Agent Systems. Research and development in applied artificial intelligence.
solutions.ai_problem: Generic AI models don't solve specific business problems. Without proprietary data, proper architecture and ML engineering, AI doesn't deliver real value.
solutions.ai_approach: We design complete AI pipelines: ingestion, feature engineering, training, validation, deployment and monitoring. Production models that learn and evolve with your data.
solutions.ai_tech: Python | PyTorch | TensorFlow | Hugging Face | LangChain | OpenAI | Anthropic | NVIDIA Nemotron | Qdrant | Milvus | MLflow
solutions.ai_results: 95%+ accuracy on proprietary models | Operational cost reduction | Complex decision automation
solutions.software_desc: Clean architecture, microservices, REST APIs, scalable systems and complete SaaS platforms. Enterprise standards and engineering best practices.
solutions.software_problem: Legacy systems accumulate technical debt. Fragile architectures block growth. Every new feature is slower and more expensive than the last.
solutions.software_approach: We design architectures from scratch — or restructure existing systems — with Clean Architecture, DDD, Event-Driven Design and microservices. Every technical decision is a business decision.
solutions.software_tech: TypeScript | Python | Go | Rust | Node.js | Next.js | React | PostgreSQL | Redis | Kafka | Docker | Kubernetes
solutions.software_results: Systems that scale without rewrites | Continuous deploy without fear | Zero technical debt from day one
solutions.data_desc: Data engineering, ETL/ELT, Data Warehouse, Data Lake, data pipelines and observability. Turning data into decisions.
solutions.data_problem: Raw data generates no value. Without robust pipelines, quality and governance, companies make decisions based on incomplete or incorrect information.
solutions.data_approach: We build enterprise data pipelines with quality from the source. Ingestion, transformation, storage and delivery — all auditable, scalable and observable.
solutions.data_tech: Python | DuckDB | BigQuery | dbt | Airflow | Spark | Kafka | Parquet | Delta Lake | Data Lakehouse
solutions.data_results: Trusted data in production | Self-healing pipelines | Real-time analytics | Controlled cost
solutions.automation_desc: Business process automation, intelligent RPA, workflow orchestration and system integration. Operational efficiency at scale.
solutions.automation_problem: Manual processes consume time, generate errors and limit growth. Teams drowning in repetitive tasks can't focus on what really matters.
solutions.automation_approach: We design intelligent workflows that integrate systems, automate decisions and free teams for high-value activities. AI-powered RPA, orchestration and monitoring.
solutions.automation_tech: Python | n8n | Temporal | Docker | REST APIs | Webhooks | LLMs | RPA
solutions.automation_results: 80% less manual tasks | Zero process errors | Immediate scalability | Measurable ROI in weeks

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Software Engineering • AI • Data • Automation
about.hero_headline: We engineer the future of business intelligence.
about.hero_text: Architecture that turns data into decisions. Engineering that builds competitive advantage. Systems that evolve with your business.
about.philosophy_text: Everything we build follows the Forge philosophy: a systematic approach combining architectural precision, continuous refinement and evolution as standard.
about.philosophy_build_desc: Every project is built from scratch with clean architecture. No inheritance. No technical debt. Just solid engineering from the first commit.
about.philosophy_refine_desc: Living systems evolve. We continuously refine every layer — data, models, code, infrastructure — based on real production metrics.
about.philosophy_precision_desc: Every line of code, every model, every pipeline is engineered with surgical intent. We don't approximate. We engineer solutions.
about.philosophy_evolve_desc: Platforms that adapt. As your business grows, your systems evolve — without traumatic rewrites, without interruptions, without artificial limits.
about.story_headline: Engineering born from a real problem.
about.story_problem: High-potential Brazilian companies face a gap: cutting-edge technology exists but is inaccessible — imported, expensive, disconnected from local reality. ERP doesn't solve it. Spreadsheets don't scale. Consulting doesn't transform.
about.story_vision: FMD was born to fill this gap. We don't resell technology — we build it. Proprietary platforms for artificial intelligence, data and automation, engineered with the same rigor as the world's largest tech companies.
about.story_evolution: Since 2020, we've evolved from an engineering studio into a product ecosystem. Nyra, InMora, Opportunity Engine, Intelligent Squads — each solving a real problem with enterprise architecture, real data and embedded intelligence.
about.engineering_headline: Software is not code. It's architecture.
about.engineering_text: Every system we design is treated as an engineering product — with planning, quality and continuous evolution. Our engineering principles ensure every platform is scalable, maintainable and future-ready.
engineering_principles: Clean Architecture — isolated domain, frameworks as details
Event-Driven — systems that react in real time
Observability — metrics, logs and tracing in every layer
Security by Design — protection from the architecture up
Quality as Standard — CI/CD with testing and review on every delivery
Data as Asset — governed pipelines, embedded analytics
about.flow_headline: From discovery to operations. A continuous flow.
about.vision_headline: Turn data into intelligent decisions through engineering.
about.vision_text: We believe the future of technology lies in the deep integration of artificial intelligence, data and software engineering. Not as separate layers, but as a cohesive system where each component amplifies the other. Our vision is to build platforms that don't just process information — but that think, learn and evolve with every decision.
about.diffs_headline: What makes us different is what makes us better.

diffs_items.title: Modular Architecture
diffs_items.desc: Every platform is designed in independent layers that can evolve separately. We swap technologies without affecting the business.

diffs_items.title: Artificial Intelligence
diffs_items.desc: Proprietary models trained on real data. NLP, computer vision, autonomous agents and multi-agent systems in production.

diffs_items.title: Data Engineering
diffs_items.desc: Enterprise pipelines that ingest, transform and deliver data with quality, governance and observability.

diffs_items.title: Cloud Native
diffs_items.desc: Infrastructure as code, horizontal scalability, controlled cost. AWS, Azure and GCP with disaster recovery and high availability.

diffs_items.title: Intelligent Automation
diffs_items.desc: Workflows that integrate systems, automate decisions and free teams. AI-powered RPA, orchestration and monitoring.

diffs_items.title: Elastic Squads
diffs_items.desc: Multidisciplinary teams that grow, shrink and specialize as needed. Engineering on demand without bureaucracy.

diffs_items.title: Proprietary Products
diffs_items.desc: Own platforms solving real problems. We are not a consulting firm that outsources — we are a technology company that builds.

about.closing_headline: Engineering that delivers. Systems that evolve.
about.closing_text: We don't build software to follow trends. We build intelligent platforms that turn data into competitive advantage. Every architecture is a strategic decision. Every system is designed to evolve with your business.

footer.description: Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data and Automation. Intelligent solutions for real challenges.
footer.description_en: Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data and Automation. Intelligent solutions for real challenges.
